data.title: Desalytics Water Solutions wins Global Water Resilience Award at Davos for innovative water technology.
data.description: A water technology company named Desalytics Water Solutions, focusing on Africa, has achieved success by winning the Water Resilience Challenge. This initiative, organized by UpLink (World Economic Forum) and HCL Group at Davos, recognizes Desalytics for their innovative efforts in enhancing water solutions. This acknowledgment underscores the company's commitment to improving water sustainability.

data.title: National Fuel Gas (NYSE: NFG) to report quarterly earnings on 2026-01-28; analysts expect EPS of $1.92. Positive outlook anticipated.
data.description: National Fuel Gas (NYSE: NFG) is scheduled to reveal its most recent quarterly earnings on Wednesday, January 28, 2026. Analysts predict the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.92. Investors are eager for National Fuel Gas's announcement, anticipating surpassing estimates and optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is crucial for new investors to recognize that guidance plays a key role in influencing stock prices. In the prior earnings report, the company exceeded expectations.

data.title: Eating Europe celebrates 15th anniversary by funding 15,000 meals for World Central Kitchen in 2026.
data.description: Eating Europe has announced that for each booking made in the year 2026, they will donate to World Central Kitchen. This contribution will support the organization's efforts in providing nourishing meals during humanitarian, climate-related, and community crises. The initiative aims to make a positive impact by aiding those in need. This partnership highlights the commitment of Eating Europe to contribute towards addressing global challenges.

data.title: Levi Strauss set to report $0.39 EPS on 2026-01-28. Previous quarter beat EPS by $0.03. Shares at $21.23, up 18.08% in 52 weeks. Analysts rate stock Outperform.
data.description: Levi Strauss is set to release its quarterly earnings on 2026-01-28, with analysts predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.39. The market is hopeful for results exceeding estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter as guidance significantly impacts stock prices. Last quarter, Levi Strauss beat EPS by $0.03 but saw a 12.55% drop in share price the next day. The company's past performance includes beating EPS estimates in three of the past four quarters, resulting in various price changes. Shares of Levi Strauss were trading at $21.23 on January 26, with a 52-week increase of 18.08%. Analysts rate Levi Strauss as Outperform based on 3 analyst ratings. With an average one-year price target undisclosed, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AI-powered platform, OnWord Stories, boosts literacy for K-5 students. Personalized stories tackle national reading crisis.
data.description: In response to the national reading crisis, a program has been introduced in Miami on January 27, 2026. The program aims to tackle low reading proficiency rates across the country by providing personalized stories tailored to each student's reading level and interests. OnWord Stories utilizes AI technology to cater to individual needs, as reading proficiency remains a significant issue. This initiative comes as a response to the escalating challenge faced nationwide, emphasizing the importance of addressing this crisis on a larger scale.

data.title: Hexcel (HXL) to report quarterly EPS of $0.50 on Jan 28. Past performance shows impact on its stock price, currently trading at $82.02. Analysts rate Hexcel as Buy with an average price target of $85.5 indicating 4.24% upside potential. Market eagerly anticipates surpassing estimates and upbeat guidance. Guidance can influence stock prices significantly.
data.description: Hexcel (NYSE: HXL) is set to release its quarterly earnings on January 28, 2026, with analysts expecting an EPS of $0.50. Investors are hopeful for a beat on estimates and positive guidance for the next quarter, as this can influence stock prices significantly. In the previous quarter, Hexcel missed EPS by $0.01 but saw a share price increase of 11.31% the next day. With shares trading at $82.02 as of January 26 and a 24.93% increase over the last 52 weeks, long-term shareholders seem optimistic. Analysts have a Buy rating on Hexcel, with an average price target of $85.5, implying a 4.24% potential upside. Keeping track of market insights and analyst ratings is crucial for investors.

data.title: TPS Group Holdings transforms retail operations across 100+ stores using KIBO and Jumpmind's solutions.
data.description: TPS Group Holdings, based in Austin, Texas, has recently revamped its retail operations in over 100 stores by incorporating KIBO and Jumpmind's integrated commerce solutions. The initiative, which began on Jan. 27, 2026, was guided by Perficient to ensure a smooth and strategic implementation process. KIBO, renowned for its composable commerce solutions, played a key role in this modernization effort.

data.title: Pre Brands reveals new packaging design highlighting protein, enhancing "Beef Done Differently" experience. - CHICAGO, Jan. 27, 2026
data.description: Pre® Brands, a prominent provider of grass-fed and grass-finished premium lean beef proteins in the United States, has introduced a new design focused on highlighting protein in a clear and modern way. The company, based in Chicago, unveiled the updated look on January 27, 2026. This initiative aims to bring "Beef Done Differently" to life, emphasizing the protein aspect of their products.

data.title: Cliffwater's private equity fund hits $5 billion AUM, leading in performance and fundraising among 1940 Act PE funds.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Cliffwater, a prominent manager of private markets interval funds, unveiled that their Cascade Private Capital Fund ("CPEFX") has achieved a milestone of $5 billion in net assets. This fund currently stands out as the top performer among 1940 Act private equity funds1, excelling in both performance and fundraising.

data.title: UPS plans to cut up to 30,000 jobs in 2026 due to reduced package deliveries for Amazon, its unprofitable customer.
data.description: The delivery company has announced its intention to implement budget reductions within the current year due to a projected decline in the volume of packages being delivered for Amazon. Amazon, a notable but financially inefficient client, is anticipated to account for a reduced number of deliveries, prompting the delivery company to make cost-saving adjustments.

data.title: Paddletek introduces new 'Reserve Honeyfoam™' paddle, marking milestone in paddle engineering. Chicago, Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: Today, Paddletek Group unveiled a groundbreaking achievement in paddle engineering by introducing the limited-edition Reserve Honeyfoam™ paddle on Jan. 27, 2026, in Chicago. This release coincides with the expansion of their sponsored athlete roster and recognition for three Paddletek leaders. The new paddle release marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to push the boundaries of paddle technology.

data.title: Kalshi increases political presence by opening DC office and hiring Democrat for state policy and federal relations - 2 new team members.
data.description: The platform for predictions market disclosed the addition of two new employees focusing on state policy initiatives and federal government relations.

data.title: Collaboration between SkySlope and OneKey® benefits 43,000 REALTORS® in New York Metro, offering faster, smarter forms.
data.description: In Sacramento, California on January 27, 2026, OneKey® MLS, a leading multiple listing service in the U.S., revealed a significant development for its members. They introduced SkySlope Forms, a top-tier digital forms solution that has been integrated into their system. This move aims to empower their members and enhance their efficiency.

data.title: 2026 Ultimate Ice Cream Fan contest offers $3,000 prize from Hudsonville Ice Cream in Holland, MI, featuring new Birthday Cake flavor.
data.description: Earn money by indulging in ice cream throughout the entire year, featuring the debut of the exclusive Birthday Cake flavor from the established 100-year-old company located in Holland, Michigan. The news was announced on January 27, 2026, by Hudsonville Ice Cream. Show off your ice cream expertise and get ready for a delicious year ahead with Hudsonville’s exciting offerings.

data.title: Armor warns organizations without AI security policies are behind, releases governance framework. Protects 1,700+ orgs across 40.
data.description: Armor has introduced an AI governance framework to fill a notable policy void amid the rapid growth in enterprise AI adoption. The company, renowned for its cloud-native managed detection and response solutions, safeguards over 1,700 entities spanning 40 industries. The new framework aims to enhance accountability and oversight in AI applications, catering to the evolving needs of businesses relying on AI technologies.
